mapper.select:
SELECT post_id, restaurant_name, target_members, current_members, minutes_until_deadline FROM v_delivery_posts
minutes_until_deadline > 0
AND pickup_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND restaurant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY minutes_until_deadline ASC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_delivery_posts
minutes_until_deadline > 0
AND pickup_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND restaurant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_posts (host_user_id, restaurant_name, target_members, pickup_location, detail_location, memo, deadline_at) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{restaurantName}, #{targetMembers}, #{pickupLocation}, #{detailLocation}, #{memo}, #{deadlineAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT host_user_id, restaurant_name, target_members, current_members, pickup_location, detail_location, memo, minutes_until_deadline, status
FROM v_delivery_posts WHERE post_id = #{postId}

SELECT u.user_id, u.nickname
FROM post_participants p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_participants WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT v.post_id, v.restaurant_name, v.current_members, v.target_members, v.minutes_until_deadline
FROM post_participants p INNER JOIN v_delivery_posts v ON p.post_id = v.post_id WHERE user_id = #{userId}
